etymology.description: Phonetic: 文 (wén, "literary") + Semantic: 彡 ("decorative lines") = variegated; literary talent
etymology.interpretation: The character 彣(wén) combines 文(wén, "literary"), suggesting its phonetic and literary aspect, with 彡("decorative lines"), highlighting its connection to ornamental detail. This signifies an association with variegation or literary decoration.
